[[King/Legends|King]] '''Arno''', with his wife, [[Leonie]], was a [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the royal leader of [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
As with all of Zeltros' monarchs, Arno was chosen by his people for his skills in combat, art, science and love. Arno was an exceedingly charismatic and intelligent individual who knew that non-[[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltrons]] were often misinformed about his species. He enjoyed collecting art, and had an especially large collection of erotic poetry. He was skilled in such entertainment as poetry reading, acrobatics, therapeutic massage, and playing the [[Zeltronian lute|Zeltron lute]]. Parties always pleased him as well.

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Arno and Leonie hosted a celebration for visitors from the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The joyous occasion was unfortunately interrupted by invasions by the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]], the [[Hiromi]] and the [[Tof/Legends|Tofs]].

==Behind the scenes==
King Arno was created by [[Mary Jo Duffy]] and [[Cynthia Martin]].
